text:
is an extra chapter of the Attack on Titan: Before the Fall manga, written by Ryō Suzukaze and illustrated by . It was included at the end of Volume 3, after Chapter 10.

Overview

 Carlo Pikale writes a report about the Survey Corps' first expedition beyond the Walls in fifteen years. 

Summary

Carlo Pikale writes about how the Survey Corps, on its first expedition in fifteen years, ran into a ten-meter Titan. He notes that the Corps had no way of defeating it, and it blocked their only way back to Wall Maria, forcing them to engage, and that although the Titans' weakness had been discovered in the previous expedition, the only way to reach it would be to use the device, which the Corps did not have. He writes that during the attack, the stowaway Kuklo attempted to fight the Titan using the Corps' rifles, and that it was thanks to Kuklo that their chances against the Titans were reborn.
